One platform for personal trainers, dietitians, and exercise physiologists. Programs, nutrition, check-ins, messaging, payments — and an AI coach that works while you sleep.

Built for every health profession

🏋️ Personal Trainers🥗 Nutritionists🍎 Dietitians🏃 Exercise Physiologists💪 Strength Coaches📱 Online Fitness Coaches🦴 Physiotherapists

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Choose which features your clients can access. A dietitian doesn't need the workout section, and a PT might not need meal plans.

🏋️

Training Programs

Build and assign workout programs with sets, reps, tempo, and coach notes. Clients log sessions live in the app.

🍎

Nutrition & Meal Plans

Create AI-generated meal plans, set macro targets, and let clients log food with a barcode scanner or photo.

💬

Client Messaging

Chat directly with clients in real time. Send voice notes, use canned templates, and let AI handle after-hours.

📋

Check-ins & Forms

Weekly progress check-ins with custom questions. Stay on top of how every client is really doing.

✅

Habit Tracking

Set daily habits and let clients track them in the app. Build consistency one day at a time.

📊

Progress & Metrics

Weight, measurements, progress photos, and personal bests — every metric in one place.

🤖

AI Coach Assistant

Your AI coach responds to clients 24/7 in your tone and style. It can also generate meal plans and workout programs.

🎨

White Label & Branding

Make Propel your own. Custom colours, logo, and branding so clients see your brand — not ours.

🎬

Video Exercise Library

Upload exercise demo videos and attach them to workouts. Clients see exactly how to perform each movement.

👥

Group Chats

Create group coaching channels for challenges, accountability groups, or team communication.

⌚

Wearable Integration

Connect Apple Watch, Fitbit, and Garmin. Pull in steps, heart rate, sleep, and activity data automatically.

📹

AI Form Check

Clients upload exercise videos and get instant AI-powered form analysis with technique feedback.

📦

Packages & Subscriptions

Create coaching packages with different tiers. Clients subscribe and get auto-billed through Stripe.

🛒

Marketplace

List your programs and templates on the Propel marketplace. Earn passive income from your expertise.

💳

Payments & Invoicing

Send invoices, manage subscriptions, and track revenue — all powered by Stripe.

AI-powered

Your AI coach works while you sleep

Clients don't stop needing support at 5pm. Your AI coaching assistant responds to messages around the clock in your tone.

  • Responds instantly to client questions and check-ins
  • Matches your communication style perfectly
  • Hands off to you seamlessly when needed
  • Toggle on or off for any client at any time

Example conversation

Hey, I missed my session today. Feeling really guilty 😔

Don't be too hard on yourself — one missed session doesn't undo your progress. How are you feeling? Want to make it up tomorrow?

AI Coach

Just been flat out at work. I'll make it up tomorrow

That's the spirit. Tomorrow is upper body — get a good sleep and stay hydrated tonight. You've got this 💪

AI Coach

Up and running in minutes

No setup call required. No lengthy onboarding. Just you and your clients, coaching.

1

Sign up in 60 seconds

Create your account, tell us your profession, and choose which features your clients can access.

2

Invite your clients

Send clients an invite link. They download the app, create a profile, and connect to you instantly.

3

Start coaching

Build programs, send check-ins, chat in real time, and let your AI assistant handle the in-between.

Coaches love Propel

★★★★★

“Propel replaced three separate tools I was using. My clients love the app and I finally feel on top of everything.”

Sarah Mitchell

Online PT, Sydney

★★★★★

“As a dietitian I only needed the nutrition and check-in features — being able to turn everything else off keeps it clean.”

James Khoury

Accredited Dietitian

★★★★★

“The AI coach handles all the after-hours messages. I used to spend an hour every night replying — now I don't.”

Mia Torres

Exercise Physiologist

Simple, transparent pricing

14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.

Starter

Perfect for coaches just getting started

$29/month
Start free trial
  • Up to 10 clients
  • All core features
  • AI coach assistant
  • Stripe payments
  • Email support
Most popular

Pro

For established coaches scaling their business

$59/month
Start free trial
  • Unlimited clients
  • All core features
  • AI coach assistant
  • Custom brand colours & logo
  • Priority support
  • Early access to new features

Clinic

For multi-practitioner clinics and teams

$119/month
Contact us
  • Unlimited clients
  • Up to 5 practitioners
  • All Pro features
  • Team dashboard
  • Dedicated onboarding
  • Custom contract

Join hundreds of health professionals who've replaced their patchwork of tools with one platform that actually works.
